name: zen-agent
description: Delegate bounded tasks to Zen-hosted Codex while keeping repository context local.

interface.longDescription: Zen Agent starts authenticated Zen-hosted Codex jobs, lets the local main agent approve only the context each job needs, and returns structured findings or patches for local review and verification.
defaultPrompt: Ask Zen Codex to review this change.
Get a second opinion without uploading my repo.
Draft a patch from explicitly shared context.
